title: Techniphilia Tools
description: A Techniphilia component providing all vanilla tools for Techniphilia materials.
body:
The Techniphilia component providing vanilla tools for Techniphilia materials. Requires [Techniphilia Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/techniphilia-core).

- **[Techniphilia Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/techniphilia-core)** (required)
- **Techniphilia Travel** (coming soon to Modrinth)
- **Techniphilia Tools** (this mod)
- **Techniphilia Base** (coming soon to Modrinth)

Provides vanilla tools for copper, tin, aluminum, and bronze. Requires [Techniphilia Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/techniphilia-core).
